description:
Wire `fz build <src.fz> -o <out>` end-to-end:

  1. Use the AOT Backend (6.1) to emit a .o
  2. Invoke `cc` to link the .o with libfz_runtime.a + the startup shim (6.2) into a native executable
  3. Drop the .o

## Acceptance

- `fz build fixtures/add1.fz -o /tmp/add1 && /tmp/add1; echo exit=\$?` prints `42` and `exit=0`.
title: fz build: emit object + link with fz_runtime + shim → executable
